name: multi-head-promotion
description: Stage policy for floorplan_checker. Stage A catches broken data/model configs, Stage B replicates promising settings, Stage C validates them under a larger budget, and Stage D is the continuation handoff slot.

stages.name: A
stages.description: Short smoke training against a tiny subset to catch shape, data, and optimizer failures.

stages.name: B
stages.description: Early truncation stage to repeat viable candidates and remove unstable runs.

stages.name: C
stages.description: Longer validation stage for candidates near the current CV Pareto frontier.

stages.name: D
stages.description: Handoff slot for checkpoint continuation or later branch execution.
